coordinatePolicy.note: Behavior anchors mirror rtp.placements.json exact coordinates for main/NPC/animal placements. Left-facing sprites remain derived by mirroring right assets.

behaviors.rationale: Imperio should read as desk-bound authority, not a roaming NPC.
Short suspicious patrol between lavatoi and gettoni point.
Legalistic pacing near papers without blocking bar flow.
Metal-detector sweep should be readable and local.
Barbecue loop sells the activity without creating route friction.
Compact loop avoids heavy silhouette blocking.
Night ritual loop should be visible but contained.
Minimal movement keeps her readable in a dark cluttered zone.
Energetic stage loop must not collide with DJ trigger.
Whistle/patrol flavor near no-pool puddle.
behaviors.inferenceRationale: Whistle/patrol flavor near no-pool puddle.

behaviors.rationale: Guarding loop around cooler/storage hints at resources.
behaviors.inferenceRationale: Guarding loop around cooler/storage hints at resources.

behaviors.rationale: Lake-edge amphibian ambience; keep near shore/path, never on water, and separated from rana_2.

behaviors.rationale: Second lake-edge amphibian variation; used as the current toad/frog counterpart because no rospo asset exists.

behaviors.rationale: Special ambient source; preserve source 25-frame atlas and do not expand into fake standard 8-frame assets.

behaviors.rationale: Special ambient mosquito hazard marker; V341 makes comfort loss depend on real sprite proximity/chase instead of a passive night timer.
behaviors.inferenceRationale: Mosquito gameplay should be spatial, visible, and avoidable: the player loses comfort only when the mosquito cloud can see/chase/bite in active hazard zones.

counterplay: use repellent or upgraded hub preparation bonus

behaviors.rationale: V361 x5 mosquito density for historic yoga pinewood without stacking adjacent sprites.
behaviors.inferenceRationale: Visible mosquito hazard should be spatial, avoidable, and denser in pinewood/beach risk zones.

behaviors.rationale: V361 x5 mosquito density for adjacent old-yoga pinewood routes.
behaviors.inferenceRationale: A second separated cloud makes the old pinewood risk continuous without using passive timers.

behaviors.rationale: V361 x5 mosquito density for the new far-west pinewood.
behaviors.inferenceRationale: The far-west pinewood should be a real spatial mosquito hazard, not an empty safe corridor.

behaviors.rationale: V361 x5 mosquito density for selected beach sections.
behaviors.inferenceRationale: Beach risk remains sparse but visible and connected to real sprite proximity.
